message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.query (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.query string-
expression filtering:

- query_simple_filter: 5-row frame, "score > 70" returns 3 rows
- query_compound_filter: 4-row frame with score+active columns,
  "score >= 80 and active == 1" returns 2 rows (drops the score=85
  row whose active=0 and the score=70 row)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.query(expr, local_dict={})), runs the Rust fp_expr::query_str
(expr, &frame, &policy, &mut ledger), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameQuery was already wired through
the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-xvakp]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
